mapper.sql: run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_cache_read, tokens_cache_write, cost_usd, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id

session_id = #{row.sessionId}, workspace_id = #{row.workspaceId}, status = #{row.status}, trace_id = #{row.traceId}, created_at = #{row.createdAt}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt}, tokens_input = #{row.tokensInput}, tokens_output = #{row.tokensOutput}, tokens_reasoning = #{row.tokensReasoning}, tokens_cache_read = #{row.tokensCacheRead}, tokens_cache_write = #{row.tokensCacheWrite}, cost_usd = #{row.costUsd}, source_type = #{row.sourceType}, source_ref_id = #{row.sourceRefId}, triggered_by_user_id = #{row.triggeredByUserId}, agent_id = #{row.agentId}, model_id = #{row.modelId}
mapper.insert: insert into runs( run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_cache_read, tokens_cache_write, cost_usd, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id ) values ( #{row.runId}, #{row.sessionId}, #{row.workspaceId}, #{row.status}, #{row.traceId}, #{row.createdAt}, #{row.updatedAt}, #{row.tokensInput}, #{row.tokensOutput}, #{row.tokensReasoning}, #{row.tokensCacheRead}, #{row.tokensCacheWrite}, #{row.costUsd}, #{row.sourceType}, #{row.sourceRefId}, #{row.triggeredByUserId}, #{row.agentId}, #{row.modelId} )
mapper.select:
select
from runs where session_id = #{sessionId} and status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 1

select
from runs where status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') and storage_mode = 'LEGACY_FULL' and updated_at < #{updatedBefore} order by updated_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
